collection.title: Bait Boards
collection.body_html: Check out our premium bait boards, perfect for making your fishing trips smoother and more fun. Our bait boards are built tough and super practical, they’ll handle all your bait prep and cleaning with ease.

Our bait boards are here to help! Whether you’re heading out for a casual day on the water or you’re a serious angler, our range of bait boards is designed to handle all your needs."}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Made with high-quality, marine-grade materials, these bait boards are built tough to tackle even the harshest marine conditions.
